lineage.Process: RasterToPolygon Outcrop_raster "G:\QWC\CoalSeamGas\B_Technical\B_Hydrogeology\Project_Geological_Modelling\02_Data\Geological_Model_2018_Final\New File Geodatabase.gdb\Layer_Outcrop_250m" SIMPLIFY Value
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Layer [gridcode] VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Cenozoic units" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Upper Cretaceous formations" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "upper Cretaceous formations" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Wallumbilla Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Bungil Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Mooga Sandstone" VB #

CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Walloon Coal Measures lower" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Durabilla Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "upper Hutton Sandstone" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "lower Hutton Sandstone" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "upper Evergreen Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Boxvale Sandstone Member" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "lower Evergreen Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Precipice Sandstone" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Moolayember Formation" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Clematis Group" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Rewan Group" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "Bandanna Formation NPZ" VB #
CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "upper Permian" VB #

CalculateField Layer_Outcrop_250m Formation "lower Permian" VB #

ExportFeatures solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020 G:\OGIA\B5_GeoModel\Z_GIS\WIP_Anna\WIP_Anna.gdb\Precipice_outcrop_regional_geomodel_2017_250m # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Layer "Layer" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,Layer,-1,-1;Formation "Formation" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,Formation,0,50;Basin "Basin" true true false 64 Text 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,Basin,0,64;hydrostratigraphic_unit "Hydrostratigraphic unit" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,hydrostratigraphic_unit,0,255;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,solid_geology_outcrop_250m_2020,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
CopyFeatures Precipice_outcrop_regional_geomodel_2017_250m "G:\OGIA\B5_GeoModel\Z_GIS\Shapefiles\PCP outcrop regional geomodel 2017\Precipice_outcrop_regional_geomodel_2017_250m.shp" # # # #

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Geological formation outcrops - 35 layers - model resolution of 250 m - UWIR2021
dataIdInfo.idAbs: Outcrop represents where geological formation are exposed at the ground surface. This feasture class represents the modelling output of geological formation present at surface, that include mapping from GSQ and Cranfield 2017, adjusted to wells and interpolated.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
